pages.text:
VETAY SP BETEANAL AIEABS

No. P(I)-35/17/61.

January 13, 1962.

The Miniatry of External Affaire, Gorernnent

of Palistan, presents its complimente to the Miniatry of Poreign Affairs, Government of the Repubile of

France, and has the honour to inform that the Govenment of Pakistan has deeided to become a Correspondent

Member of the International Organizatien er Jogai

Metrology. The Ministry of External Affairs of Pakistan would, therefore, be grateful if the Ministry of Foreign

Affairs, Government of the Republio of France, would kindly inform the International Organization of Legal

Metrology and other authorities concerned of the decision of the Governent of Pakistan.

The Ministry of External Affaire, Government

of Pakistan, avails itself of this opportunity to renew to the Miniatry of Foreign Affairs, Government of the Republie of France, the assurances of its highest consideration.

AFFA

24

The Mindetry of Foreign Affairs,

Government of the Republie of France, p٥٣..
